overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic urban underpass in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features teal ambient lighting with yellow neon strips, alternating concrete and brick walls, and sparse vehicle traffic passing on the right. The camera moves steadily toward a bright exit where a 'Wellsprings' area sign appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with pedestrian walkway

events.description: vehicle drives past on the right side of the underpass
left wall texture changes from concrete to exposed brick

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk through the underpass

notable_agents.action: car driving through the underpass from behind and passing the camera

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete wall with yellow neon strip lights mounted on it
horizontal yellow neon light strips running along the left wall
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing line
concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure on the right side
bright white light visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a dark, enclosed urban underpass. The left side features a concrete wall with distinctive yellow neon strips, while the right side shows a multi-lane road with concrete support pillars. A vehicle passes by on the road around the 10-second mark, and the wall texture transitions to exposed brick around 15 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with exposed brick walls and overhead ventilation ducts

events.description: second vehicle passes by on the right side of the underpass
wall texture changes back from brick to smooth concrete

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the underpass with large ventilation pipes now visible overhead

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving through the tunnel, headlights visible

entered.detail: exposed reddish-brown brick wall section replacing the concrete
large cylindrical metal ventilation duct mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: This segment features the underpass wall transitioning to exposed brick with large metal ventilation pipes appearing overhead. The camera continues walking forward as vehicles periodically pass on the right. Around 30 seconds, the wall returns to concrete texture while the ventilation pipes remain visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass approaching exit with area transition signage

events.description: holographic 'Entering New Area Wellsprings' sign appears on the left wall
approaching bright exit causes increasing ambient light and glare

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright tunnel exit with increasing light levels

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall section returning after the brick section
glowing holographic sign reading 'ENTERING NEW AREA WELLSPRINGS' with green diamond icon

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the tunnel exit with dramatically increasing brightness. The 'Wellsprings' area sign appears on the left wall around 52 seconds. The ventilation pipes and brick wall section exit the frame as the camera moves past them, while the concrete wall continues. The bright exit light dominates the view as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, industrial urban underpass that gradually opens into a blindingly bright exit. It begins by moving past a concrete wall accented with yellow neon strips while vehicles pass on a multi-lane road to the right. As the camera advances, the concrete gives way to exposed brick walls and large metal ventilation pipes overhead, before the texture shifts back to concrete. The scene then accelerates toward the tunnel's end, passing a Wellsprings area sign on the left as the overhead pipes disappear from view. Finally, the surrounding structures recede as the camera moves directly into the dominating white light of the exit.
